final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for LUMEA BEAUTY, a feminine skincare brand targeting the Japanese market.

Style/medium: clean UI/UX mockup, bright and airy aesthetic, feminine editorial style with soft gradients
Composition: full-width hero section layout with three-column structure — left text column (40%), center model focal point (30%), right product display (30%), generous whitespace, 16:9 aspect ratio
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, approachable and radiant expression
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient background from soft pink to white, subtle floral accents with purple flowers in corners, minimalist studio setting
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, bright and welcoming atmosphere, gentle shadows
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple flowers as accent, gold accents on stat cards
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must be a static UI mockup not a functional website; all Japanese text must be legible and properly placed; maintain clean hierarchy with headline, subheadline, feature badges, bullet points, and CTAs on left; floating stat cards and product display on right; benefit cards at bottom
Avoid: dark themes, cluttered layouts, masculine aesthetics, neon colors, realistic photography of actual people (stylized illustration or 3D render preferred), stock photo watermarks, deformed hands or facial features
